_publications._publicationTitle: Revisiting the NPcis mouse model: A new tool to model plexiform neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: compared them with a para-spinal neurofibroma from the Hoxb7-Cre Nf1 f/f, an established neurofibroma model
details: Used as established neurofibroma model for comparison with NPcis dorsal root ganglion histology
